name: Soupy Enchilada Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 large or more ground beef, cooked and drained
2 cups grated Taco or Cheddar, and/or Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the bottom of a 9x13 inch pan with tortilla chips.
2. Mix the cooked ground beef with 4 canned ingredients (including green chilies if using) and pour over the chips.
3. Sprinkle cheese on top (2 cups or more).
4. Bake at 350°F until set and hot through, about 30-35 minutes.
